description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a predominantly white and gray color palette. The structure includes multiple rectangular volumes, large windows, and a rooftop terrace with greenery. A swimming pool is integrated into the outdoor area, surrounded by a low wall and landscaping elements such as trees and shrubs. The main entrance is accentuated by a pathway and a small gate, with a driveway leading up to the house. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The overall layout suggests a spacious, open-plan interior with outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, rooftop terrace, swimming pool, and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rooftop terrace with greenery, pool area, and a low wall enclosing the property.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, driveway, large windows, and a tree near the gate.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, additional landscaping, and the open layout of the outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible rooftop greenery, vertical window strips, and a clean, minimalist facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a minimalist door, small steps, and a pathway leading from a gated driveway, accented by landscaping.
